allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {$_InterfaceAlias -notlike ''*Loopback*''} | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, IPAddress")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName ''*3000*'' 2>$null; netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name=''Node 3000'' 2>&1")
